description: Style Note Lightweight and soft, inner wear from chromozome epitomises comfort Fit and takes care of individual requirements with a lot of variety. Ensuring that you are relaxed inside and look good outside, these are stylish necessities that you shouldn't do without. Product Details Black Sports boxer briefs, soft elasticated waistband, tagless comfort, blue branding in front, double layering at the pouch, blue panels on the sides and blue binding around the leg holes Material and Care 96% cotton and 4% lycra Machine wash warm Do not iron on print Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
